items.briefing:
Deepfake scams are becoming more convincing, but Bitdefender has released a free app called RealCheck that can help identify whether images or videos have been artificially generated — useful as these tactics increasingly appear in phishing and fraud attempts targeting Australians. Separately, Experian and Resistant AI are now working together to tackle document fraud in Australia and New Zealand, where fake or manipulated identity documents are a growing concern for businesses during customer onboarding.

If you use a Mac at work, be aware of a newly identified security gap in macOS that could allow users to accidentally disable protective security tools — check with your IT team to ensure your device's security software is functioning correctly.

**Tip:** If you receive an unexpected video message or call from someone asking for sensitive information, use RealCheck or a similar tool to verify it's genuine before responding.

featured.title: ASD to retire Essential Eight within two years, consults on replacement
featured.quote: Australia's foundational cybersecurity framework is being replaced, requiring urgent national attention.
